videos.title: Jeongseon. Workforce. FIS ski world cup in South Korea.
Steven Nyman 3rd - Downhill - Jeongseon 2016
videos.description: Steven Nyman's 3rd place finish in the downhill in Jeongseon, Korea in the first test event for the 2018 PyeongChang Olympics.

videos.title: Audi FIS ski world cup in JEONGSEON Super G 2017
Steven Nyman's 22nd - Super G - Jeongseon 2016
videos.description: Thomas Biesemeyer's 22nd place run in the Super G in Jeongseon, Korea at the first test event for the 2018 PyeongChang Olympics.

videos.title: PyeongChang 2018: Top 5 Para Cross Country Skiing Moments
videos.description:
Check out five of the best moments from Para Cross Country Skiing at the recent 2018 PyeongChang Winter Paralympics. 

Watch more at Paralympic.org.

International Paralympic Committee's vision is to make for an inclusive world through Para sport. Our mission is to lead the Paralympic Movement, oversee the delivery of the Paralympic Games and support members to enable Para athletes to achieve sporting excellence.

SUBSCRIBE for more great Paralympic content ▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/paralympics
